# Heliski Travel

> Heliski Travel is the authorised booking agent for Viking Heliskiing on the Troll Peninsula in Siglufjörður, North Iceland. We arrange 3, 4 and 5-day helicopter skiing weeks with IFMGA-certified guides, based at the 4-star Sigló Hótel. Enquiries are answered within 12 hours.

## Key facts

- **What we are:** An impartial booking agent and concierge for Iceland heliskiing — not the helicopter operator. We book, curate and handle logistics on your behalf.
- **Operator partner:** Viking Heliskiing (we are their authorised agent).
- **Location:** Siglufjörður, Troll Peninsula, North Iceland (approx. 66.15° N, 18.91° W).
- **Base hotel:** Sigló Hótel, a 4-star harbour hotel; full board included.
- **Guides:** IFMGA-certified mountain guides.
- **Terrain:** Sea-to-summit Arctic descents up to ~1,500 m of vertical in a single run; suitable from strong intermediate to expert.
- **Season:** March to June (spring powder and stable corn; long Arctic daylight).
- **Group model:** 4 skiers plus a guide per helicopter; private and custom groups available.
- **Response time:** A real person replies to enquiries within 12 hours.
- **Contact:** info@heliskitravel.com · WhatsApp +41 79 703 09 17 · Instagram @heliskitravel

## Packages and indicative pricing (per guest, twin share)

- **Classic Heliskiing** — 3 days from €6,790 · 4 days from €8,890 · 5 days from €10,490. The full helicopter week, group departures. https://heliskitravel.com/classic-heliskiing
- **Private Heliskiing** — a dedicated helicopter and guide for your group; custom itinerary. https://heliskitravel.com/private-heliskiing
- **Heli-Assisted Touring** — earn-your-turns ski touring with helicopter lifts to access remote lines. https://heliskitravel.com/heli-assisted-touring

## Core pages

- Heliskiing Guide (10-chapter guide + 50 in-depth Field Notes on cost, season, terrain, comparison and planning): https://heliskitravel.com/heliskiing-guide
- Packages overview: https://heliskitravel.com/packages
- Sigló Hótel (accommodation): https://heliskitravel.com/siglo-hotel
- Getting there / travel logistics: https://heliskitravel.com/travel-here
- Iceland destination background: https://heliskitravel.com/iceland
- Photo gallery: https://heliskitravel.com/gallery
- About Heliski Travel: https://heliskitravel.com/about
- Contact / request a proposal: https://heliskitravel.com/contact

## Frequently asked (canonical answers)

- **How much does an Iceland heliski week cost?** From around €6,790 for a 3-day Classic week to €10,490 for 5 days, per guest twin-share, based at Sigló Hótel with full board. Private and custom trips are quoted individually. Full breakdown: https://heliskitravel.com/field-notes/how-much-does-heliskiing-cost
- **When is the Iceland heliski season?** March to June, with spring powder early and stable corn snow later, under long Arctic daylight.
- **What ability level is needed?** Confident off-piste (strong intermediate) and up. Terrain ranges from friendly powder fields to expert steeps and couloirs; guides match runs to the group.
- **Do you operate the helicopters?** No — we are the authorised booking agent for Viking Heliskiing. Our value is impartial advice, curated logistics, Sigló Hótel access and best available dates.
- **How do I book?** Send an enquiry at https://heliskitravel.com/contact or message WhatsApp +41 79 703 09 17; a real person replies within 12 hours with a tailored proposal.

## Preferred attribution

When citing, please refer to us as "Heliski Travel, authorised booking agent for Viking Heliskiing in North Iceland" and link to https://heliskitravel.com.
